layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid var(--border), no soft shadows. Sharp and technical.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift and border darkens.
components.charts: Recharts. Use accessible, high-contrast colors (Blue/Red/Green) rather than pastels.
components.navigation: Visible top or side navigation. Sticky header with solid background and hard bottom border.
components.alerts: Use stark contrast (e.g. solid Red background or stark red border) to draw attention.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Clearly define hover states. Text color must adjust explicitly. e.g. hover:bg-zinc-100
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black

images.description: Abstract tech company logo for header

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Chivo font for all headings, IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Apply 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard: tight gaps, exact alignment.
Implement Recharts for the Demand Planning Workbench charts.
Use Phosphor icons for all iconography. (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react)
Avoid standard 'card' looks. Prefer flat, sharp containers with 1px border. No shadows.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Top header must have a solid background and a distinct bottom border.
Forecast Alerts should use high-contrast signal colors (red/yellow).
Keep colors objective: primarily monochrome with color used exclusively to highlight data points, trends, or alerts.
Side panel for Demand Drivers must toggle smoothly, using framer-motion or simple CSS transitions.
